subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。小指の輪に左右の人差し指と中指を上から入れます
subtitle.en: Begin in "Opening A". Insert both index and middle fingers from above into the little-finger loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指と中指で、全ての糸の下を通して親指手前の糸を挟んで人差し指に糸をかけながら引き出します
subtitle.en: With both index and middle fingers, pass under all the strings, grasp the near thumb strings, and draw them out, letting the strings fall onto the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、全ての糸の下を通して小指向こうの糸を取り、親指の輪から引き出します
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pass under all the strings, pick up from below the far little-finger strings, and draw them out of the thumb loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指薬指小指で、人差し指上の糸と親指手前の糸を除く全ての糸を握ります
subtitle.en: With the middle, ring, and little fingers of both hands, grasp all the strings except the index-upper strings and the near thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で人差し指上の糸を上から握ります。左右の中指薬指小指で握っていた糸を離します
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over and grasp the index-upper strings; release the strings held by the middle, ring, and little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指を、全ての糸の下を通して小指の輪に上から入れ、小指手前側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Pass both thumbs under all the strings, insert them from above into the little-finger loops, and move over and pick down the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指を、親指の三角の輪から引き出します
subtitle.en: Draw both thumbs out of the thumb triangles.

subtitle.ja: 左親指を向こうに向け、左親指の輪の上側にある向こう側の糸を取り、親指の輪から引き出します
subtitle.en: Turn the left thumb away, pick down the far upper string of the left-thumb loop, and draw it out of the thumb loop.

subtitle.ja: 右親指を向こうに向け、右親指の輪の上側にある向こう側の糸を取り、親指の輪から引き出します
subtitle.en: Turn the right thumb away, pick down the far upper string of the right-thumb loop, and draw it out of the thumb loop.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の全ての糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release all strings from both index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 指先を向こう側に向け、両手を左右に開いて完成です
subtitle.en: Turn the fingertips away and open the hands to the sides to show the finished figure.
